pkgmetadata.longdescription: Gradia is a native GTK4/libadwaita application that makes your screenshots ready for sharing. Drop in an image and get back a polished result: gradient, solid, or image backgrounds; padding, corner rounding, shadow, and aspect-ratio presets; annotation tools (arrows, shapes, text, highlighter, censor, and numbered steps); crop mode; optional OCR text recognition; and direct upload to configurable providers.

use.flag: Enable optical character recognition via app-text/tesseract and dev-python/pytesseract.
